title: Threat Modeling Pipeline + CWP + ITDR — Automated Threat Model Generation
description: test_threat_modeling_pipeline_engine.py, test_cloud_workload_protection_engine.py, and test_itdr_engine.py cluster with test_email_security_engine.py. The threat modeling pipeline does STRIDE analysis with a 16-cell risk matrix but models must be manually created. ITDR detects identity threats with confidence clamping but does not auto-trigger threat model updates when new identity attack patterns emerge.
missing: Auto threat model generation: scan api_discovery_engine endpoint list and auto-generate STRIDE threat entries for each endpoint based on HTTP method and data classification tags
ITDR → threat model update: when ITDR detects an impossible-travel anomaly, auto-add a STRIDE Spoofing threat entry to the relevant identity component in the threat model
Email security → phishing threat model: integrate email_security_engine domain SPF/DKIM/DMARC findings as STRIDE Spoofing entries in the threat model
